title: Tijōn's Epic Arsenal
description: Tac Z's firearms are now fully compatible with Epic Fight!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CYbHB2LL1Zg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Epic Arsenal Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/730ac4af6de53c347abf8b48ec8e682e242eb781_0.webp)Tijōn's Epic Arsenal is a comprehensive compatibility mod that seamlessly integrates Tac Z's firearms with the Epic Fight mod, enabling full animation synchronization for all combat actions. This mod ensures that every shooting, reloading, and aiming animation is properly handled through Epic Fight's animation system, providing a cohesive and immersive tactical combat experience.





![header1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bc0fa12d59e8ba0972a6df36ce7b9e4015a26cd.png)
![ex1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe29b5589553820a126134beb5de80bc80969fa9.gif)

📙 Completely Integrated Shooting Animations: All firearm shooting actions are synchronized with Epicfight's animation framework. Meaning now for the first time ever you can fully play third person Tac Z with full epic fight animation support, featuring animations made completely from scratch by Tijōn & merlin204.





![header2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130996d700adac2cdc77e1c313ef4e4ec437befc.png)

![ex2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ca7b6ded9fbdbde839a724c4e7ef91a2257e722.gif)
♻️ Reload Animations: Full reload sequences for each firearm type, including tactical reloads and empty reloads.


![ex3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66d215b2c9d20bff6b3846175215a30773561001.gif)
🔫 Aiming System: Proper aiming animations with appropriate stance adjustments for different weapon types

⚔️ Visible Weapons: All weapons are visible on your character while moving in Epic Arsenal mode, just like in the original Tac Z mod!

![ex4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99ed9c989513663ebeff84b38c9bd87ecef821ff.gif)

🔪 Melee Animations: Each weapon type within reason has a working melee animation for third person routed to the same keybind as the original melee in first person, and yes; it auto switches between animations when in 1st or 3rd person!

📸 Auto Pov Switch: Camera is set up to allow players to seamlessly switch between Epic Arsenal Animations in third person and standard Tac Z animations in 1st person

📦 Auto Gun Sorting: Our mod is coded to automatically sort any gun add ons from Tac Z into one of the animation types by Tac Z gun categories, meaning EVERY Tac Z add on should automatically be supported in third person with our animation framework.





![header3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad974c744d150156f8d06823359f1376ed53af7.png)
![ex6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3930ba480ce0476e0b547aa4d99bf827c6122785.gif)

🛟 Smooth Transitions: Fluid transitions between combat stances and regular movement.

🎮 Seamless Integration: Configured to work with most modern Epic Fight or Tac Z add ons, as well as supporting full on controller support and third person action camera through latest Epic Fight + Controlify

🎯 Preset Weapon Categories The mod comes pre-configured with five optimized firearm categories:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

PISTOL

SHOTGUN

MINIGUN 

LAUNCHER 

RIFLE 

SNIPER

THROWABLES

+ MORE

+ Magazine swap reloads


</details>






![header4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28839576557c851be8837c791597341e6a7e837.png)

⚙️ Configuration System All compatibility settings are managed through epic_arsenal-common.toml configuration file. This has been made easily accessible from within game and allows modular additions of any gun mods by adding them to the appropriate gun type whitelist.



This is my first ever mod, be nice lol

Credit for all the coding that actually made the mod work is 100% merlin204! Dude is a beast!
